sqlMap.select: SELECT taskid, creatorid, case when #primary# = 1 then creatorname else creatorName2 end as creatorname, case when #primary# = 1 then creatordeptname else creatordeptname2 end as creatordeptname, creatoremail, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(createdate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as createDate, taskstatus, completerate, importance, hasshare, hasattach, hascomment, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(startdate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as startdate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(enddate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as enddate, title, contentpath, tasktype, updatetime, personid, case when #primary# = 1 then personname else personname2 end as personname, personname as personname1, personname2, case when #primary# = 1 then persondeptname else persondeptname2 end as persondeptname, persondeptname as persondeptname1, persondeptname2, personemail, personattach, personcontentpath, memo FROM TBL_TASK WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID#

SELECT taskID, commentid, commentorid, case when #primary# = 1 then commentorname else commentorname2 end as commentorname, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(commentdate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as commentdate, comment FROM TBL_TASKCOMMENT WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID#

SELECT sharerid, case when #primary# = 1 then sharername else sharername2 end as sharername, sharername as sharername1, sharername2, case when #primary# = 1 then sharerdeptname else sharerdeptname2 end as sharerdeptname, sharerdeptname2, shareremail FROM TBL_TASKSHARE WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID#
SELECT taskid, attachid, filename, filepath, filesize FROM TBL_TASKATTACH WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID# AND type = #type#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_TASK (creatorid, creatorname, creatorname2, creatordeptname, creatordeptname2, creatoremail, createdate, taskstatus, completerate, importance, hasshare, hasattach, hascomment, startdate, enddate, title, contentpath, tasktype, updatetime, personid, personname, personname2, persondeptname, persondeptname2, personemail, personattach, memo, tenantid) VALUES
(#creatorID#, #creatorName#, #creatorName2#, #creatorDeptName#, #creatorDeptName2#, #creatorEmail#, #nowDate#, #taskStatus#, 0, #importance#, #hasShare#, #hasAttach#, 'N', #startDate#, #endDate#, #title#, #contentPath#, #taskType#, #nowDate#, #personID#, #personName#, #personName2#, #personDeptName#, #personDeptName2#, #personEmail#, 'N', #memo#, #tenantID#)
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()

INSERT INTO TBL_TASKSHARE (taskid, sharerid, sharername, sharername2, sharerdeptname, sharerdeptname2, shareremail, updatetime, tenantid) VALUES (#taskID#, #sharerID#, #sharerName#, #sharerName2#, #sharerDeptName#, #sharerDeptName2#, #sharerEmail#, #nowDate#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_TASK SET importance = #importance#, hasshare = #hasShare#, hasattach = #hasAttach#, startdate = #startDate#, enddate = #endDate#, title = #title#, tasktype = #taskType#, updatetime = #nowDate#, personid = #personID#, personname = #personName#, personname2 = #personName2#, persondeptname = #personDeptName#, persondeptname2 = #personDeptName2#, personemail = #personEmail#, memo = #memo# WHERE tenantID = #tenantID# AND taskID = #taskID#

update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_TASK SET hascomment=#hasComment# WHERE tenantID = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID#
UPDATE TBL_TASK SET hascomment=#hasComment# WHERE tenantID = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID# AND 0 = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_TASKCOMMENT WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID# )

sqlMap.update: INSERT INTO TBL_TASKCOMMENT (taskid, commentorid, commentorname, commentorname2, commentdate, comment, tenantID) VALUES (#taskID#, #commentorID#, #commentorName#, #commentorName2#, #nowDate#, #comment#, #tenantID#)
UPDATE TBL_TASK SET taskstatus = #taskStatus#, completerate = #completeRate# WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID#
UPDATE TBL_TASK SET personattach = #personAttach#, personcontentpath = #personContentPath# WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_TASKCOMMENT WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID# AND commentid = #commentID#
DELETE FROM TBL_TASKATTACH WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID# AND type = #attachType#
sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL((SELECT delaycolor FROM TBL_TASKCONFIG WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND userid = #userID#), '##ff0000') as delaycolor, IFNULL((SELECT completecolor FROM TBL_TASKCONFIG WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND userid = #userID#), '##00ff00') as completecolor, userid FROM TBL_TASKCONFIG WHERE userid = #userID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#

SELECT DISTINCT(A.taskid), creatorid, creatorname, creatorname2, creatordeptname, creatordeptname2, creatoremail, importance, hasattach, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(startdate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as startDate, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(enddate,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as endDate, title, tasktype, taskstatus, completerate, personid, personname, personname2, persondeptname, persondeptname2, personemail, hascomment, memo FROM TBL_TASK A LEFT JOIN TBL_TASKSHARE B ON A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE A.tenantid = #tenantID#
taskstatus != 3
taskstatus = 3
((A.creatorid = #userID# AND A.tasktype = 1) OR (A.personid = #userID#) OR (B.sharerid = #userID# and A.TASKID = B.TASKID))
(A.creatorid = #userID# AND A.tasktype != 1)
title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #filter#), '%')
personname LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #filter#), '%')
taskstatus = 1
taskstatus = 2
taskstatus = 3
taskstatus = 4
((startdate >= #startDate# and startdate <= #endDate#) OR (enddate >= #startDate# and enddate < #endDate#) OR (startdate < #startDate# and enddate >= #endDate#)) AND (A.personid = #userID# or (B.sharerid = #userID# and A.taskid = B.taskid) or A.creatorid = #userID#)
ORDER BY A.startdate DESC, A.taskid DESC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT(A.taskID)) FROM TBL_TASK A LEFT JOIN TBL_TASKSHARE B ON A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE A.tenantid = #tenantID# AND ((A.creatorid = #userID# and A.tasktype = 1) OR (A.personid = #userID#) OR (B.sharerid = #userID# and A.TASKID = B.TASKID))
title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #filter#), '%')
personname LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #filter#), '%')

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT(A.taskID)) FROM TBL_TASK A LEFT JOIN TBL_TASKSHARE B ON A.tenantid = B.tenantid WHERE A.tenantid = #tenantID# AND (A.creatorid = #userID# and A.tasktype != 1)
AND title LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #filter#), '%')
AND personname LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #filter#), '%')
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_TASKCONFIG (userid, delaycolor, completecolor, tenantid) VALUES (#memberID#, #delayColor#, #completeColor#, #tenantID#)
INSERT INTO TBL_TASKATTACH (taskid, filesize, filename, filepath, type, tenantid) VALUES (#taskID#, #fileSize#, #fileName#, #filePath#, #taskType#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_TASKCONFIG SET delaycolor = #delayColor#, completecolor = #completeColor# WHERE userid = #memberID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_TASK WHERE tenantid = #tenantID# AND taskid = #taskID#
DELETE FROM TBL_TASKSHARE WHERE taskid = #taskID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_TASKATTACH WHERE taskid = #taskID# AND tenantid = #tenantID#
